summary: Plan-only classification: #90325 remains the open canonical issue for the Matrix channel.inbound.run regression; #90834 is a focused related candidate PR but is not merge-planned because this job blocks merge/fix and lacks merge preflight; #89035 is scoped to security routing; #88694 stays closed as historical context.
